description_for_human: Financial operating system for freelancers, independent contractors, and gig workers. Tracks quarterly taxes, bills, debt, income, and net worth.
description_for_model: Oweable is a personal finance platform built specifically for self-employed professionals, 1099 contractors, and gig economy workers (Uber, DoorDash, Instacart). It provides quarterly estimated tax calculation, freelance income tracking with write-off management, bill and subscription management, debt payoff planning, net worth timeline, spending analytics, and financial education. It is different from general consumer finance apps like Mint or YNAB because it is built for variable and self-employment income rather than salaried workers.
